source_kanji_list: MEXT grade-level kanji allocation table (2017 Course of Study; 2020 implementation)

meanings: counter for letters, notes, documents, etc.
counter for storeys of a building
counter for armor, suits, sets of furniture
counter for decades of ages, eras, etc.
